Bonus for new Players. Welcome Offer is 200% match up to €3,000 plus 50 free spins on your 1st deposit, 50% match up to €250 plus 100 free spins on your 2nd deposit, and 100% match up to €250 plus 50 free spins on your 3rd deposit. Bonus funds are separate to Cash funds, and are subject to x35 wagering the total bonus money, deposit and free spins. Minimum Deposit: A minimum deposit of €20 is required for each of the first three bonuses. Wagering Requirements: Bonus funds are subject to a 35x wagering requirement of the total bonus money, deposit, and free spins. Game Contributions: Not all games contribute equally to the wagering requirements. Players should review the game weighting contributions on the Spinland website. Bonus Expiry: Unused bonus funds expire after 30 days, and unused free spins expire after 10 days.

Casino Online

Casino on the net has developed into a wholly new level with casino sites like Vera&John, Betsson, BitStarz, VideoSlots who are in forefront.

All of these casinos have developed their whole web page for mobile phone gambling. Here you get the ultimate casinoexperience, since it is created for the mobile phone, computer and tablet.

 

You can gamble on all the classical games like Roulette, Black Jack or Bingo, and due to the simplicity you don’t have to register, you could play for free or create a account and play with real money. All that is needed is a will to gamble and have fun.


When was the first casino online started ?
The company Microgaming was the first to offer a digital casino as early as in 1994.

At that time, you had to call a server with your modem and then gamble against the server. So we can call that the online casino’s mother. From having to put on you suit and go to the big city and gamble, people from the whole world could ”phone in” with their modem and get going. Soon afterwards came Betsson ad a few other of today’s gigants to offer their systems.


Why casino on the net is best using the mobile phone ?
How often does it happpen that you come into a regular casino and become greeted with a few thousand in your hand and a few hundred free spins ?

The selection is very large with lots of games, from old classics to new ones like Wixx and Gem Rocks. Casino on the net is developed every day, so login and experience the latest games.

 

Find all online casinos here

TIPS

  • You can help by voting for your favorite Casino at Santa Claus Casino.
    It only works once per casino.
    How many stars will you give each casino ?
  • Make so that Santa Claus Casino.com will end up as a bookmark or favorite on your mobile phone, computer or tablet. Then it will be easier to get back here again.
  • When you play blackjack, always stay on 17.
  • Play slots with all deposit lines.
  • Do not use the autospin-function.
  • Do not gamble for more money than you can afford to lose.
  • Use casino bonuses and casino spins offers we have at Santa Claus Casino.com
  • Always compare new online casinos at Santa Claus Casino !

Is it possible to increase the chances of winning at an online casino?

One way to increase your chances of winning is to check the game’s RTP (Return to Player).

What does RTP mean?

RTP is an abbreviation for ‘Return To Player’

På Svenska blir det ”Tillbaka till spelaren”

RTP is a percentage that shows how much you can win of what you have bet. ‘Payout percentage’.

Blackjack

Average RTP 99%

Advantage: If you master blackjack strategies, you can reduce the house’s advantages up to 99% in some variants.

Slots

Average RTP 90-98%

Advantage: Slots can have additional cumulative jackpots, which increases the RTP.

Roulette

Average RTP 95%

Advantage: However, different roulette variants have different RTPs.

House edge & RTP are opposites of each other.

When RTP is used in conjunction with a game, it explains how much the game theoretically pays back from what you bet.

Keep in mind that RTP is theoretical and anything can happen.

Games with high RTP should pay back more than games with low RTP.

House edge in slots

In slots, the house or casino has a certain advantage. For example: If a slot has an RTP of 98%, then the house edge is 2%.

Are you addicted to gambling?

If you suspect that you are addicted to gambling, we recommend that you contact contact gamblersanonymous.org, responsiblegambling.org, begambleaware.org or call National Gambling Helpline Freephone 0808 8020 133 8am-midnight 7 days a week. LIVE CHAT or talk live online. You are anonymous in your contact.
